title: Sydney based, Need an expert to help us set up monday.com

posts.author: kindertech (KinderTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JeffF2000 , I would love to set up a call with you and hear your needs and where your operation currently sits. We are a Monday Partner and specialize in Monday and automation system design. We also have the flexibility to work untypical US working hours to accommodate for the time difference.

You can book a meeting with me here: Kinder Tech | Expert Business Process Automation Services

I will contact you via email as well.
All the best.

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JeffF2000, have fired through an email.
